nodes.label: Xhatch
nodes.description: Started my own company, learning firsthand what it means to build products, work with clients, and run a business. This experience shaped my understanding of entrepreneurship and the challenges of building something from scratch.

nodes.label: Black Pixel
nodes.description: Joined as a designer, helping build the design foundation from the ground up. Helped scale both the design team and the company's vision for a more expressive, accessible internet.

nodes.label: One Medical
nodes.description: Led product design during One Medical's critical transition to virtual care and eventual IPO. Designed experiences that transformed how primary care is delivered, making healthcare more accessible and human-centered.

nodes.label: Webflow
nodes.description: Joined as the first Head of Design, building the design foundation from the ground up. Helped scale both the design team and the company's vision for a more expressive, accessible internet.

nodes.label: Replit
nodes.description: Served as VP of Marketing and Design, leading the rebrand that repositioned Replit from a hobby app to a professional AI-native software development platform.

nodes.label: Atlassian
nodes.description: Currently serving as VP and Head of Design, AI, helping shape the future of work through generative AI and systems design. Leading design for Rovo, Atlassian's AI-powered knowledge assistant.
